# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE: "checksums.sha256"
  ALLOWED_ARTIFACT_EXTENSIONS: "bin,conf,yaml,json"
  MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE_MB: "500"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache coreutils findutils
  script:
    - mkdir -p build/binaries build/configs
    - echo "Building application binary..."
    - echo "binary-content-$(date +%s)" > build/binaries/app.bin
    - chmod 755 build/binaries/app.bin
    - echo "Creating configuration files..."
    - |
      cat > build/configs/app.conf <<EOF
      app_name=secure-app
      version=${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      environment=production
      EOF
    - |
      cat > build/configs/deployment.yaml <<EOF
      apiVersion: v1
      kind: Config
      metadata:
        commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
        pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}
      EOF
    - echo "Validating artifact extensions..."
    - |
      find build -type f | while read file; do
        ext="${file##*.}"
        if ! echo "${ALLOWED_ARTIFACT_EXTENSIONS}" | grep -qw "$ext"; then
          echo "ERROR: Unauthorized file extension detected: $ext in $file"
          exit 1
        fi
      done
    - echo "Checking artifact sizes..."
    - |
      find build -type f -size +${MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE_MB}M | while read file; do
        echo "ERROR: File exceeds maximum size: $file"
        exit 1
      done
    - echo "Generating artifact checksums for integrity verification..."
    - find build -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; > ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    - cat ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    - echo "Removing any potentially dangerous permissions..."
    - find build -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;
    - find build -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \;
    - chmod 644 ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
  artifacts:
    name: "build-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    expire_in: 30 days
    paths:
      - build/
      - ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
  only:
    - branches
    - tags
  tags:
    - docker

security_scan:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache file coreutils
  script:
    - echo "Verifying artifact integrity..."
    - |
      if [ ! -f "${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Checksum file not found"
        exit 1
      fi
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    - echo "Scanning for sensitive data patterns..."
    - |
      if grep -r -E '(password|secret|api[_-]?key|token|private[_-]?key)' build/ --include="*.conf" --include="*.yaml" --include="*.json"; then
        echo "WARNING: Potential sensitive data found in artifacts"
      fi
    - echo "Validating file types..."
    - |
      find build -type f | while read file; do
        filetype=$(file -b "$file")
        echo "File: $file - Type: $filetype"
        if echo "$filetype" | grep -qi "executable"; then
          if [[ ! "$file" =~ \.bin$ ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Unexpected executable file: $file"
            exit 1
          fi
        fi
      done
    - echo "Security scan completed successfully"
  dependencies:
    - build
  only:
    - branches
    - tags
  tags:
    - docker

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache coreutils curl
  script:
    - echo "Validating deployment environment..."
    - |
      if [ -z "${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME}" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Environment name not set"
        exit 1
      fi
    - echo "Verifying artifact integrity before deployment..."
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    - echo "Validating artifact paths to prevent directory traversal..."
    - |
      find build -type f | while read file; do
        realpath=$(readlink -f "$file")
        if [[ ! "$realpath" =~ ^${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/build/ ]]; then
          echo "ERROR: Path traversal detected: $file"
          exit 1
        fi
      done
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - mkdir -p /tmp/deploy_staging
    - cp -r build/* /tmp/deploy_staging/
    - echo "Validating configuration files..."
    - |
      for conf in /tmp/deploy_staging/configs/*.conf; do
        if [ -f "$conf" ]; then
          if grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+=.+$' "$conf" > /dev/null; then
            echo "Configuration valid: $conf"
          else
            echo "ERROR: Invalid configuration format: $conf"
            exit 1
          fi
        fi
      done
    - echo "Setting secure permissions on deployed files..."
    - find /tmp/deploy_staging -type f -exec chmod 640 {} \;
    - find /tmp/deploy_staging -type d -exec chmod 750 {} \;
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed successfully"
    - echo "DEPLOY_PATH=/tmp/deploy_staging" >> deploy.env
  dependencies:
    - build
    - security_scan
  artifacts:
    expire_in: 7 days
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy.env
  only:
    - branches
  when: manual
  tags:
    - docker

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache coreutils curl gnupg
  script:
    - echo "Production deployment initiated..."
    - |
      if [ "${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}" != "main" ] && [ -z "${CI_COMMIT_TAG}" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Production deployments only allowed from main branch or tags"
        exit 1
      fi
    - echo "Verifying artifact integrity with checksums..."
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    - echo "Performing final security validation..."
    - |
      find build -type f -name "*.bin" | while read binary; do
        size=$(stat -c%s "$binary")
        if [ $size -eq 0 ]; then
          echo "ERROR: Empty binary file detected: $binary"
          exit 1
        fi
      done
    - echo "Validating no symlinks or special files..."
    - |
      if find build -type l -o -type p -o -type s | grep .; then
        echo "ERROR: Symbolic links or special files detected"
        exit 1
      fi
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - mkdir -p /tmp/deploy_production
    - cp -r build/* /tmp/deploy_production/
    - echo "Applying production security hardening..."
    - find /tmp/deploy_production -type f -exec chmod 440 {} \;
    - find /tmp/deploy_production -type d -exec chmod 550 {} \;
    - echo "Production deployment completed successfully"
    - echo "Deployment metadata:"
    - echo "  Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
    - echo "  Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
    - echo "  Deployed by: ${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}"
  dependencies:
    - build
    - security_scan
  only:
    - main
    - tags
  when: manual
  tags:
    - docker

cleanup_old_artifacts:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Artifact cleanup job - artifacts auto-expire after 30 days"
    - echo "Current pipeline artifacts will be available until $(date -d '+30 days' 2>/dev/null || date -v+30d)"
  only:
    - schedules
  tags:
    - docker
